description:
Add a manual server action "BICC v5: Send SMS Queue Digest" to the
hr.applicant Action menu. When triggered, it emails the HR Recruitment
Manager group ONE digest listing every applicant who needs an SMS
follow-up right now. Each section is a 3-column table (Applicant name
with link, mobile number, ready-to-send SMS text) for the three
populations the daily sms_queue_digest cron already surfaces:
Qualification info-survey pending, Stage 1 resume missing, Stage 7
assessment pending.

HR copies each SMS into their phone, sends it manually, then marks
the corresponding x_studio_sms_*_date on the applicant so the queue
clears. The action does not send anything to applicants directly and
does not mutate any reminder fields.

Defensive: each section field-checks at runtime, so the action is safe
to deploy before the v5 reminder-field blocks land — sections whose
driving field is missing are simply omitted from the digest.
